neighbors.name: Ward Levon Formby
neighbors.claims: Ward Levon Formby is connected to a long-rooted local family in Polk County, Georgia (e.g., Charles Elmer Formby lived his entire life in the county) ([Alvis Miller Funeral Home](https://www.alvismillerfuneralhome.com/obituaries?page=30)). The individual does not hold any public office or civic position on the Polk County Board of Commissioners ([Polk County Government](https://www.polkga.org/government/board_of_commissioners/index.php)).

approach_recommendations.engage: Approach via a respectful, personal conversation (ideally through a long-time community member) to understand any concerns.
